creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

Nothing was wrong with it. For the part it is alright and I have used it.
But for the second part I could not generate any test data. That is
although for the part there is test cases and some common files for the
second I could not find any common files as far as I remember. I have
tested it with different options enabled/disabled. Let me know if I have
missed anything.

Happy porting.

BR,
Muhammad


On Wed, Apr 23, 2014 at 1:52 AM, olli hauer <ohauer@gmx.de> wrote:

> Hm,
>
> what was wrong with the patch provided in PR 187145
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=187145&getpatch=2
>
>
> The pkg-plist handing of files installed with OPTION AGENT and / or SERVER
> is really error prone on the old port and with your patch.
>
> What happens if a user selects AGENT and SERVER is a single file will be
> recorded twice, thats why I proposed the following solution.
>
> .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MSERVER} || ${PORT_OPTIONS:MCLIENT}
> PLIST_SUB+=     NXMAP=""
> .else
> PLIST_SUB+=     NXMAP="@comment "
> .endif
>
> .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MSERVER} || ${PORT_OPTIONS:MAGENT}
> PLIST_SUB+=     SERVER_AGENT=""
> .else
> PLIST_SUB+=     SERVER_AGENT="@comment "
> .endif
>
>
> --
> Regards,
> olli
>
